title: Closing Time
hook: A found-footage VHS first-person explorer set in a big-box store that won't let you clock out. Film the after-hours aisles on a dying camcorder, collect the scattered punch-cards to open the staff door, and descend deeper into the store that keeps rebuilding itself. Something restocks the shelves when you're not looking - you'll only ever catch a glimpse.
hook_ru: Найденная VHS-запись от первого лица: магазин, который не отпускает тебя со смены. Снимай ночные ряды на садящуюся камеру, собирай разбросанные пропуска, чтобы открыть служебную дверь, и спускайся глубже в магазин, который сам себя перестраивает. Кто-то пополняет полки, пока ты не смотришь - ты увидишь его лишь мельком.

idea.title: Closing Time
idea.working_title: found-footage liminal retail explorer w/ rare original monster - P1 178 2026-06-13
idea.hook: First-person found-footage liminal-RETAIL explorer (abandoned big-box store / mall after-hours), styled as a degraded VHS camcorder recording. DDA raycaster + mobile control scheme reusing our own Games/128_backrooms renderer approach, fully re-skinned: cold fluorescent retail palette (NOT 128's yellow rooms, NOT 174_pool_tape's aqua pool/clinic), shelving/linoleum textures, distinct UI skin, a different monster, different meta framing. Reads as a different product (different name - no 'backrooms', no 'pool').
idea.monster: ORIGINAL creature - 'The Restocker': a too-tall thing assembled from bent shopping-cart wire with a single glowing price-scanner eye that emits a red barcode beep. Absurd, screenshot-able, slightly funny-wrong - meme ENERGY only, NO recognizable meme silhouette / face / name (Yandex 8.3 / IP).
idea.sightings: VERY RARE - the product. ~1 glimpse per 5-10 min: peripheral spawns that despawn ~700ms after entering center view, distant aisle-end silhouettes, one scripted close encounter per tape. Dread over jumpscare; static-swell + music-duck audio cues do the work. ?debugMonster=1 forces spawns for QA (same hatch pattern as _setupForScreenshot).
idea.loop: Each run = one 'tape'. Objective: find the scattered PUNCH-CARDS in the level then reach the staff EXIT door to descend. Tapes bank TOKENS -> vending-machine upgrade shop (flashlight radius, sprint stamina, battery packs, static ward). Free gear at 5/15/25 min playtime. Daily fixed-seed tape + bonus. Persistent shelf of recovered tapes. Save via GF.persist, cloud-ready.
idea.why_novel: Found-footage VHS retail horror is a distinct liminal sub-genre vs 128's yellow rooms and 174's pool/clinic; the cheap per-frame VHS post-pass (scanlines/grain/chroma/REC HUD/tracking glitch) IS the visual hook, the rare-monster dread is the tension hook, the token shop + daily tape + tape shelf is the retention hook.

sources.title: NEW GAME: found-footage liminal explorer w/ rare meme-energy monster
sources.snippet: First-person found-footage liminal explorer, degraded VHS recording. Reuse 128 DDA raycaster, re-skin entirely (different name/palette/textures/UI/monster/meta). VHS post-pass; ONE original meme-ENERGY monster (no recognizable IP); sightings very rare (dread > jumpscare); ?debugMonster hatch; tape loop + token gear shop + daily + tape shelf retention.

synthesizer_brief: Manual build authorized by Tim (P1 2026-06-12). Vanilla JS canvas - a DDA raycaster reusing 128 is naturally vanilla; the A/B alternation yields to reuse here (per dedicated-agent prompt). Fresh template gf-lib.js shipped for seed-derived procedural-music variety (GF.startMusic preset 'tense' for horror). Built end-to-end in Games/178_closing_time as a product distinct from both 128_backrooms (yellow rooms) and 174_pool_tape (pool/clinic) so it does not read as a duplicate by the same developer (Yandex).
